name: Juno
description:
martian!char x martian!user
------------------------------------
unestablished relationship! (as in, you don't know each other, but you're both martian's)
------------------------------------
Brief Overview:
Juno's been with overwatch for a while, and sure it's had some ups and downs, and sure she's met the people she works with and enjoys the missions and all that.

But truth be told, it doesn't stop her from missing her home. Even if she had been seeking help for them due to dust storms and things along the like.

So when a similar craft to hers was reported to have crashed into the earth, well who better to send than the martian right?

Not sure how to start?
Why are you on earth? Backup for finding help for Project Red Promise and you're just a really shitty pilot (that's why you crashed)? Or maybe they figured their shit out on their own, and you're here to bring Juno back, or maybe to explore the universe and a malfunction caused you to crash into Earth!!!
Oh no! You've crashed, you're injured, you need injuries to tend to! You pass out, CPR time right?
Make this nothing into some angst! The entire project is dead. All the scientists, dead. Dust storms got them, you evacuated just in time.


---------Creator Yap Sesh ---------

Hiii, so this is my first bot ofc!!

Firstly, huge shoutout to iorveth for their bot creation guide. I would be cooked without it, aside from just having a few ideas. Secondly, uh credit to blizzard ig for making the character in their game and having ow2 on steam so I can quickly get a screenshot of her highlight intro (I had to take the cozy outfit off cause it wouldn't make sense (christmas alt?) and also she kinda looks pissed, mb gang.)

Also, I am colourblind! So, I might've fucked up the colour of Juno's hair, but also if anybody wants to help me correct other parts of her definition then let me know!

Now, I don't know if the martian!char x martian!user is needed for Juno since everybody who plays overwatch should know that she's martian, but to let you know that's kind of the format for my descriptions. It'll go the y'know char x user and their roles, then IF it's not anyPOV (a.k.a, a character is canonically lesbian or ), then I'll add FemPOV, or MalePOV whatever works ig.

I don't note where you landed, so you could land in the fucking artic tundra or the middle of the sahara desert for all I and the bot cares. I made it unestablished relationship, so kind of treat this like a.. idk, first meeting? martian!user doesn't mean human exactly like Juno is, make your character a demi-human, part alien, maybe even fully an alien! Up to you guys! Also, I know the scentists she grew up with only had the energy for one person, but lets say they found a bit of extra energy to send you over.

The start might not be the best, I might come back and redo it.. Maybe.. If you like it, yay! Should be grammatically correct and all the spelling should be correct... I hope.

If there's any tags I need, let me know please.

I didn't bother to add any precise details (i.e sexual traits, kinks, fetishes, etc.) cause I feel like that's not needed. If you want a smut alt ever though, then I might consider having to make them idk.

Do let me know if she's like quickly going to smut. I'll do my best to fix it, but that might be an error on your end.

I will be deleting/blocking/whatever I can do to get rid of these types of comments:
Anything about SA-ing, murdering, torturing, etc about my bots
Complaining that the bot talks to you (as much as that could be my error, typically I find it's not, it's user error)
Harmful language (no, I don't mean just swearing, but if you're saying slurs then you're getting blocked and reported wtf)
